info.title: KARVIA Pro API
info.description:
Multi-tenant OKR management platform with assessment capabilities

## Features
- Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
- Multi-tenancy via company_id scoping
- JWT Authentication (7-day expiry)
- Real-time analytics & insights
- AI-powered OKR generation
- SSI Assessment System (Speed, Strength, Intelligence)

## Authentication
All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
Tokens are obtained through `/api/auth/login` or `/api/auth/signup`.

## Multi-Tenancy
Data is automatically scoped to the user's company_id (extracted from JWT).
CONSULTANT role can manage multiple companies via the `managed_companies` array.
